description: Create a medical program definition in the OpenMRS administration interface (https://localhost/openmrs/admin) using username 'superman' and password 'Admin123'. Create a Concept named 'Nutrition Support Program' (Class: 'Program' or 'Misc', Datatype: 'N/A') and a Program named 'Nutrition Support' linked to that concept. The program must include the description: 'Outpatient nutrition rehabilitation and monitoring'.
